What's Included

🥂 Sip, Swing & Stay Package

Confirmed · Call (325) 784-4653 to book

  • $120 food & beverage credit per person = $360 total for the crew
  • Rustic cabin — queen bed, queen pullout sofa, twin loft beds · sleeps all 3

Friday–Sunday · Jun 26–28

$580.63/person
Friday · Jun 26
Morning — Leave Houston or Dallas
Manvel: leave by ~11 AM · Dallas: leave by ~12 PM · See Travel tab for maps
Friday · Jun 26
~2:30 PM — Arrive · Check in · Hit the range
Drop bags, quick warm-up, get comfortable with the course before the round
Friday · Jun 26
3:30 PM — Tee Time · 18 Holes · Round 1
#10 public course in Texas. Scout the greens, learn the layout — you'll use this on Saturday.
Friday · Jun 26
~7:30 PM — 19th Hole · Clubhouse drinks
First night's F&B credit starts now. Cold drinks, debrief every hole.
Friday · Jun 26
8:30 PM — Dinner · The Hideout Grill
Eat well. Firepit after. Early night — 7 AM tee tomorrow.
Saturday · Jun 27
7:00 AM — Tee Time · 18 Holes · Round 2
Apply everything from Friday. You know the greens now. Go score.
Saturday · Jun 27

Second night's F&B credit. Eat, hydrate, rest the legs.
Saturday · Jun 27
12:30–4:30 PM — Pool · Hot tub · Lake Brownwood
Recover. Boat rentals, kayaks, poolside bar, or just sit on the porch with a cold one.
Saturday · Jun 27
5:00 PM — Tee Time · 9 Holes · Round 3
Golden hour golf. Best light of the weekend. Pick your 9 and finish strong.
Saturday · Jun 27
~6:30 PM — Dinner · The Hideout Grill
Firepit after. Last full night. F&B credit rolls.
Sunday · Jun 28

Final round. Everything you've learned all weekend, all 18 holes. Make it count.
Sunday · Jun 28

Sunday · Jun 28
~12:30 PM — Head home

The Course

The Hideout Golf Club

#10 Public Course in TX
DesignerBill Johnston · Championship layout · Hill Country terrain · 18 holes
Rankings#10 Texas public course (GolfPass) · #13 (Golf Advisor) · ★★★★ 4.4/5
SettingLush fairways, meandering creeks, giant oaks, Hill Country vistas. Bunkers and water hazards reward distance and accuracy.
Facilities
Driving RangePro ShopGolf CartsLessonsClubhouse Grill
Book(325) 784-4653 · thehideouttexas.com
⭐ "For mid-June, the golf course was in top condition." · "This place is severely underrated." · Staff pauses when you're about to hit — that's the vibe.
🍽

Where We Eat

The Hideout Grill

On-Site · Covered by F&B Credit
MenuBreakfast, lunch & dinner daily. Known for the protein bowl, margaritas, post-round burgers. Bar open late.
Credit$120/person/night — $360/night for the crew. 2-night = $720 total. Most meals and drinks covered.
NearbyBrownwood ~15 min away — Underwood's BBQ is a local favorite if you want to venture out

Travel Notes

Friday ArrivalFirst tee time is 3:30 PM Friday — no early wake-up needed. Manvel leaves by 10 AM, Dallas leaves by 12:30 PM. Arrive with ~30 min to check in, grab clubs, and warm up.
Manvel Timing5 hrs 21 min drive. Leave ~10:00 AM → arrive ~3:00 PM → tee off 3:30 PM. Saturday 7 AM tee: already at the cabin — just walk to the first tee.
Dallas Timing2 hrs 58 min drive. Leave ~12:30 PM → arrive ~3:00 PM → tee off 3:30 PM. Saturday 7 AM tee: already at the cabin — no drive needed.
2-Night AdvantageStaying Friday AND Saturday means zero driving the morning of any tee time. Walk to the first tee at 7 AM Saturday and 7 AM Sunday fresh — no rush, no early alarm.
I-20 ClosureI-20 W is currently closed from Dallas — Google routes via US-67 S instead. Check Maps the day before departure for latest conditions.
Gas Est.~$55–$75/person from Manvel (638 mi RT) · ~$30–$45/person from Dallas (318 mi RT)
Address185 Hideout Lane, Brownwood, TX 76801
